UnitAbilities.Title: Arcane Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Webway Strike
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a friendly Aeldari unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, you can choose to set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of this Fortification. If you do, that Aeldari unit can be set up within 9" of enemy models, and can be set up within Engagement Range of enemy models. If an Aeldari unit is set up within Engagement Range of any enemy models in this way, it counts as having made a Charge move this turn and is eligible to fight this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortifications from your army
UnitAbilities.Text:
▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

Infos.Title: DEPLOYMENT
Infos.Text: Both Wraithbone Arches of this Fortification must be set up with their upper points no more than 1" apart and with both statues facing in fully opposite directions so that an arch is formed, as shown on the right. Both arches are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Scorpion’s Bite
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability when targeting units without the Titanic keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadow Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sustained Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bringer of the True Death
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hunter Unseen
UnitAbilities.Text: This model’s unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

UnitAbilities.Title: Path of Command
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ride the Wind
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strafing Run
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Into the Foe
UnitAbilities.Text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 30 Aeldari Infantry models. Each Wraith Construct model takes the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or Ynnari models (excluding Yvraine and The Visarch).

UnitAbilities.Title: Reckless Abandon
UnitAbilities.Text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Titan Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Way of the Shaper (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, Wraith Construct models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bonesinger
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Wraith Construct or Asuryani Vehicle units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psytronome Shaper
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Wraith Construct or Asuryani Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Wraith Construct or Asuryani Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cloudbreakers
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skyleap
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skyfire
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem just after an enemy unit that can Fly starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, when resolving that Stratagem, in addition to shooting that enemy unit, you can select up to 3 other enemy units within 24" of this model that can Fly; this model can also shoot at each of those units with its Firestorm scatter laser (provided each one is an eligible target), but when doing so, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Aeldari Infantry models. Each Wraith Construct model takes the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or Ynnari models (excluding Yvraine and The Visarch).

UnitAbilities.Title: The Path Least Travelled
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies and determined who has the first turn, you can select one Rangers or Shroud Runners unit from your army and redeploy that unit. When doing so, that unit can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Path of the Outcast
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Reaver Band
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Infos.Title: CORSAIRS
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Corsair Voidreavers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: D-rift
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s D-impaler, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a D-rift. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a D-rift this phase suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lightning Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move, then roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Speed of Vaul
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 9" to the Move characteristic of this model.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Interceptor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lanced Obliteration
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack made with this model’s twin Scorpion pulsar destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 4+ instead of on a 6.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Agile
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over other models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

UnitAbilities.Title: Webway Shunt Generator
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this model from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scattershield
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shade of Twilight
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reaper of Souls
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shadow of Death (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Devastating Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Horrify (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Guided by Fate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cameleoline Cloak
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Rangers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Corsair Raider
UnitAbilities.Text: This model gains the Scouts 7" ability, add the Anhrathe keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Corsair Voidreavers, Corsair Voidscarred.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Aspect Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Save characteristic to 3+. Add the following units to the list of units this model can be attached to: Dark Reapers, Dire Avengers, Fire Dragons, Howling Banshees, Striking Scorpions.

UnitAbilities.Title: Path of the Witch
UnitAbilities.Text: The model gains the Psyker keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Wayleaper’s Heavy Aspect Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 14", its Save characteristic to 3+, it gains the Deep Strike ability, and add the Fly and Jump Pack keywords. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Swooping Hawks, Warp Spiders.

UnitAbilities.Title: Doomseer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outcast
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Superlative Strategist
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this model’s unit, and you can re-roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warden of Fate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Winds of War
UnitAbilities.Text: This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Path of the Witch
UnitAbilities.Text: The model gains the Psyker keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skyrunner’s Heavy Aspect Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Save characteristic to 3+. Add the following unit to the list of units this model can be attached to: Shining Spears.

UnitAbilities.Title: Doomseer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outcast
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Superlative Strategist
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this model’s unit, and you can re-roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warden of Fate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Awakened Spirit
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Path of the Witch
UnitAbilities.Text: The model gains the Psyker keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Doomseer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Superlative Strategist
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this model’s unit, and you can re-roll any rolls made for that unit while it is performing an Agile Manoeuvre.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warden of Fate
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover.
